title: Gamified Habit Builder
tagline: Turn real-life progress into an interactive, high-stakes game
description: Create a solution that translates everyday habits into engaging game loops. Use streaks, duels, status points, RPG elements, or social accountability to keep users hooked on their self-improvement journey.

title: Autonomous AI Agent
tagline: Build an AI that acts, not just responds
description: Develop an autonomous agent that can perform multi-step tasks, make decisions, and interact with external APIs. Think beyond chatbots - create a true digital worker.

title: Real-time Collaboration Hub
description: Build a real-time collaborative platform where multiple users can interact, share data, and work together seamlessly. Focus on WebSocket/P2P architecture.

title: Interactive Data Visualizer
tagline: Turn complex data into beautiful stories
description: Create stunning, interactive data visualizations that help users understand complex datasets. Focus on animations, interactivity, and insights.
